description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build Snapshots that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to the master branch. Use a matrix job that runs on multiple operating systems (ubuntu-latest, ubuntu-22.04, macos-12, and windows-latest) with different CPU architectures (x86_64, aarch64, arm, and x64). For each job, check out the repository, install prerequisites, configure the environment, and then build and upload the project as a redistributable package.
